name: Men's Shiny Plastic Combo Square Sunglasses - Original Use™ Tortoise Brown: Scratch-Resistant, UV Protection
description:
Shiny plastic combo square sunglasses with a blended frame in a brown tortoiseshell pattern and solid black. Showcase gray lenses offering UV protection to keep eyes shielded from harmful sun rays, and designed with scratch-resistant properties for worry-free everyday use. Feature hinged temples for convenient folding and storage.

If you're not satisfied with any Target Owned Brand item, return it within one year with a receipt for an exchange or a refund.

Original Use™: Always the next evolution.
